name: Belt Miner
description: Spent years cracking rock in the outer belts, running double shifts on aging drill rigs for outfits that barely kept the air filters clean.

name: Navy Pilot
description: Flew patrol routes for the Terran Navy before mustering out. Knew every transit corridor in the system by heart and could dock a frigate half-asleep.

name: Corporate Accountant
description: Worked the books for a mid-tier mining conglomerate. Got real good at finding the margins nobody else saw and talking contractors into lower rates.

name: Dock Worker
description: Loaded and unloaded cargo at orbital stations, welded hull plates between shifts, and learned how ships were put together by taking them apart.

name: Smuggler
description: Ran unlicensed freight through contested lanes, staying one step ahead of customs patrols. Had a talent for talking past inspectors when the flying didn't work.

name: Field Medic
description: Patched up miners and rig workers at remote extraction sites where the nearest hospital was a three-day burn away. Learned to keep a crew calm when things went bad.

name: Research Assistant
description: Ran assays and sample analysis for a corporate R&D lab, cataloguing mineral compositions from core samples that field crews hauled back by the crate.
